message:
feat(agents): support conversation history passthrough for resumption

Enable spawning agents with existing conversation state:

agent.ts:
- Add conversationHistory and toolState to spawnAgent config
- Pass through to driver via providerOptions

claude-driver.ts:
- Initialize session with provided conversationHistory instead of []
- Extract history from providerOptions with type assertion

This enables agent session resumption by providing prior conversation
turns when spawning a new agent instance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
